nasb.text: Saul vowed to her by the Lord, saying, “As the Lord lives, no punishment shall come upon you for this thing.”

esv.text: But Saul swore to her by the Lord, “As the Lord lives, no punishment shall come upon you for this thing.”

cnv.text: 掃羅指著耶和華起誓說：“我指著永活的耶和華起誓，你必不因這事受懲罰。”

ccb.text: 扫罗凭耶和华向妇人起誓，说：“我凭永活的耶和华起誓，你必不会因为此事而受到惩罚。”
